object.name: setManagedBotAccessSettings
object.description: Use this method to change the access settings of a managed bot. Returns True on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to change the access settings of a managed bot. Returns True on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to change the access settings of a managed bot. Returns :code:`True` on success.

annotations.description: User identifier of the managed bot whose access settings will be changed
annotations.html_description: User identifier of the managed bot whose access settings will be changed
annotations.rst_description: User identifier of the managed bot whose access settings will be changed
annotations.name: user_id

annotations.description: Pass True if only selected users can access the bot. The bot's owner can always access it.
annotations.html_description: Pass True if only selected users can access the bot. The bot's owner can always access it.
annotations.rst_description: Pass :code:`True` if only selected users can access the bot. The bot's owner can always access it.
annotations.name: is_access_restricted

annotations.description: A JSON-serialized list of up to 10 identifiers of users who will have access to the bot in addition to its owner. Ignored if is_access_restricted is False.
annotations.html_description: A JSON-serialized list of up to 10 identifiers of users who will have access to the bot in addition to its owner. Ignored if is_access_restricted is False.
annotations.rst_description: A JSON-serialized list of up to 10 identifiers of users who will have access to the bot in addition to its owner. Ignored if *is_access_restricted* is :code:`False`.
annotations.name: added_user_ids
